item.title: Why is Vega Jewellers Ltd falling/rising?
item.description: On 28 Apr, Vega Jewellers Ltd experienced a modest decline in its share price, slipping 0.8% to close at ₹61.95. Despite this fall, the stock remains near its 52-week high, reflecting a complex interplay of strong long-term gains and recent short-term pressures. Time: 1 hour ago

item.title: Why is Go Digit General Insurance Ltd falling/rising?
item.description: On 28-Apr, Go Digit General Insurance Ltd’s stock price declined by 0.66% to ₹317.80, continuing a recent downward trend amid disappointing quarterly results and valuation pressures despite strong long-term fundamentals. Time: 1 hour ago

item.title: Why is PTC India Ltd falling/rising?
item.description: On 28-Apr, PTC India Ltd witnessed a significant rise in its share price, closing at ₹205.70 with a gain of ₹10.5 or 5.38%. This upward momentum reflects a combination of robust market performance, favourable valuation metrics, and heightened investor participation. Time: 1 hour ago

item.title: Why is Rajapalayam Mills Ltd falling/rising?
item.description: On 28 Apr, Rajapalayam Mills Ltd witnessed a significant uptick in its share price, rising by 5.8% to close at ₹816.60. This movement marks a notable reversal after three consecutive days of decline, reflecting a positive shift in investor sentiment amid mixed volume and liquidity signals. Time: 1 hour ago

item.title: Why is Karnataka Bank Ltd falling/rising?
item.description: On 28-Apr, Karnataka Bank Ltd's stock price rose sharply by 3.87% to ₹264.25, reaching a new 52-week high of ₹264.8. This upward momentum reflects a combination of robust long-term growth, strong investor participation, and favourable valuation metrics that have propelled the stock well above benchmark indices. Time: 1 hour ago

item.title: Why is Vidhi Specialty Food Ingredients Ltd falling/rising?
item.description: As of 28-Apr, Vidhi Specialty Food Ingredients Ltd’s stock price has declined by 1.66% to ₹299.15, continuing a downward trend that reflects persistent underperformance relative to benchmarks and concerns over its long-term growth prospects and valuation. Time: 1 hour ago

item.title: Why is J K Cements Ltd falling/rising?
item.description: On 28-Apr, J K Cements Ltd witnessed a notable decline in its share price, falling by 2.29% to close at ₹5,477.10. This drop reflects a combination of short-term market pressures and underlying concerns about the company’s financial metrics despite its strong recent earnings performance. Time: 1 hour ago
